mapper.select: SELECT l.*, s.name AS student_name, c.name AS class_name FROM sys_leave l LEFT JOIN sys_student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON l.class_id = c.id
SELECT l.*, s.name AS student_name, c.name AS class_name FROM sys_leave l LEFT JOIN sys_student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON l.class_id = c.id WHERE l.id = #{id}
SELECT l.*, s.name AS student_name, c.name AS class_name FROM sys_leave l LEFT JOIN sys_student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON l.class_id = c.id WHERE l.class_id = #{classId}
SELECT l.*, s.name AS student_name, c.name AS class_name FROM sys_leave l LEFT JOIN sys_student s ON l.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON l.class_id = c.id WHERE l.student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_leave (student_id, class_id, start_time, end_time, reason, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{classId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, NOW(), NOW())
